title: The Scheduled Securities (Hyderabad) Act,1949
full_text: The Scheduled Securities (Hyderabad) Act,1949 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194907 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 1949-02-16 Act Year: 1949 Short Title: The Scheduled Securities (Hyderabad) Act,1949 Long Title: An Act to provide for the control of the transfer of certain securities and for the issue of duplicate securities in respect thereof Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 16-02-1949 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Scheduled Securities (Hyderabad) Act,1949 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Title to scheduled security not affected by previous transfers. Section 4. Issue of duplicate securities. Section 5. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 6. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 7. Repeal of Ordinance XXXVII of 1948.
